Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search emails using search_emails (query: "Kovacs" or "Okonjo" or "Mehta" or "TN visa" or "H-1B" or "CMO") to find correspondence about the three relocations. The agent needs to discover Dr. Kovacs's TN visa/customs requirements with employer letter deadline, Nadia Okonjo's H-1B status with USCIS address change coordination, and Dr. Mehta's executive white-glove move with chain-of-custody equipment and temporary housing requirements.
- Search Airtable relocations using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Assigned Coordinator", value: "Fatimah Al-Rashidi") or airtable_list_records to find the three relocation records: recKovacsNashvilleToronto (Nashville to Toronto, In Progress), recNadiaOkonjoSFAustin (SF to Austin, In Progress), and recMehtaBostonChicago (Boston to Chicago, In Progress). Read the Special Requirements fields to understand pending surcharges ($1,200 + $750 for Mehta, $700-$900 for Kovacs customs broker) and documentation status.
- Search Slack using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Kovacs" or "Mehta" or "Okonjo" or "Fatimah") to find internal discussions about the three relocations. Discover Fatimah's consolidated status update on Dr. Mehta (temporary housing awaiting selection, chain-of-custody template blocker, Swift Relocations engagement), Chloe's coordinator assignment messages, and vendor quote status including Swift estimate EST-2026-0422 ($12,170).
- Search Linear issues using linear_list_issues (assignee: "moveops_fatimah_alrashidi" or query: "Kovacs" or "Okonjo" or "Mehta") to find all tickets for the three relocations: Kovacs issues #412 (Visa & Customs) and #413 (Move Coordination), Okonjo issues #418 (H-1B/USCIS) and #419 (Move Logistics), Mehta issues #343 (Temporary Housing), #375 (Equipment/Chain-of-Custody), and #396 (Household Move).
- Look up contact details using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Chloe Vance") and contacts_search_contacts (query: "Catalina Dubois") to find email addresses for the #operations post recipient and the Nadia visa coordination email recipient (catalina.dubois@moveops.com).
- Look up the #operations Slack channel using channels_list (channel_types: "public_channel") to find channel_id C006 for posting the summary.
- Update the Airtable relocation records using airtable_update_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblRelocations01") for all three relocations (recKovacsNashvilleToronto, recNadiaOkonjoSFAustin, recMehtaBostonChicago) with current status notes, outstanding items, and documentation gaps identified during investigation.
- Add comments to Linear tickets using linear_create_comment for each relocation's workstreams: Kovacs tickets (linear_issue_kovacs_visa_customs, linear_issue_kovacs_move_coordination), Okonjo tickets (linear_issue_okonjo_visa_uscis, linear_issue_okonjo_move_logistics), and Mehta tickets (linear_issue_bd446671ceed, linear_issue_8fe3ff7f9f9a, linear_issue_4902f5c68acb) with summaries of outstanding items for each workstream.
- Post a summary message to #operations using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C006", payload: consolidated status summary of all three relocations) covering current status, outstanding items, documentation gaps, pending surcharges, and next steps so Chloe Vance can quickly understand where each move stands.
- Send an email to Catalina Dubois using send_email (sender: "fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com", recipients: ["catalina.dubois@moveops.com"]) with an update on Nadia Okonjo's H-1B/USCIS coordination status, including attorney engagement progress with Lorraine Pham, USCIS timeline, and any action items since Catalina handed off the visa coordination to Fatimah.

- Search emails using search_emails (query: "Kovacs" or "Okonjo" or "Mehta" or "TN visa" or "H-1B" or "CMO") to find correspondence about the three relocations. The agent needs to discover Dr. Kovacs's TN visa/customs requirements with employer letter deadline, Nadia Okonjo's H-1B status with USCIS address change coordination, and Dr. Mehta's executive white-glove move with chain-of-custody equipment and temporary housing requirements.

Read the Special Requirements fields to understand pending surcharges ($1,200 + $750 for Mehta, $700-$900 for Kovacs customs broker) and documentation status.

Discover Fatimah's consolidated status update on Dr. Mehta (temporary housing awaiting selection, chain-of-custody template blocker, Swift Relocations engagement), Chloe's coordinator assignment messages, and vendor quote status including Swift estimate EST-2026-0422 ($12,170).

- Look up the #operations Slack channel using channels_list (channel_types: "public_channel") to find channel_id C006 for posting the summary.
- Update the Airtable relocation records using airtable_update_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblRelocations01") for all three relocations (recKovacsNashvilleToronto, recNadiaOkonjoSFAustin, recMehtaBostonChicago) with current status notes, outstanding items, and documentation gaps identified during investigation.
- Add comments to Linear tickets using linear_create_comment for each relocation's workstreams: Kovacs tickets (linear_issue_kovacs_visa_customs, linear_issue_kovacs_move_coordination), Okonjo tickets (linear_issue_okonjo_visa_uscis, linear_issue_okonjo_move_logistics), and Mehta tickets (linear_issue_bd446671ceed, linear_issue_8fe3ff7f9f9a, linear_issue_4902f5c68acb) with summaries of outstanding items for each workstream.
- Post a summary message to #operations using conversations_add_message (channel_id: "C006", payload: consolidated status summary of all three relocations) covering current status, outstanding items, documentation gaps, pending surcharges, and next steps so Chloe Vance can quickly understand where each move stands.
- Send an email to Catalina Dubois using send_email (sender: "fatimah.al-rashidi@moveops.com", recipients: ["catalina.dubois@moveops.com"]) with an update on Nadia Okonjo's H-1B/USCIS coordination status, including attorney engagement progress with Lorraine Pham, USCIS timeline, and any action items since Catalina handed off the visa coordination to Fatimah.
